productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Chase Black Casual Shoes
description: Blending the legendary minimal design of Ransom teams and the sporty vibe of adidas, The Chase is a boot silhouette with a waterproof upper that makes it a great wear in misty and snowy weather - a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. It's sleek design also makes it a fabulous everyday wear shoe.This pair comes with an extra pair of stylish laces.UpperLeather upper with waterproof qualitiesLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortHigh ankle for absolute comfort and better support to the lower legPull loop for easy on/off and to hang the boots from a backpackMidsoleMoulded EVA midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
